title: gagea foliosa subsp. soleirolii
intro: Gagea foliosa subsp. soleirolii, also known as the Soleiroli's Gagea, is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gagea foliosa subsp. soleirolii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Gagea foliosa subsp. soleirolii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
